Video.summary: A legend in the exploitation genre, these are the films that define director Jack Hill's career.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Giant monsters are on the rampage! Who will save us?
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From satirical comedies to intense dramas, these war movies capture the chaos, tragedy, and complexity of conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hollywood's greatest heroes fight history's greatest battles in this classic war film collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 2: The Fight for Freedom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Revisit an epic collection of war films that capture the bravery, sacrifice, and cost of conflict.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 3: Triumph and Turmoil
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These gripping war films explore the chaos, complexity, and moral ambiguity of conflict on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 4: The Fog of War
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look at the bizarre body horror and sci-fi films of director David Cronenberg.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Two American soldiers must put aside their differences in order to survive on a remote island after they are attacked by Japanese forces in World War II.
Video.title: Battle of Blood Island

Video.summary: Aliens and Androids have taken a “Fantastic Voyage” to Earth, and now we are all in “Altered States!”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 1

Video.summary: “Invaders from Mars” have landed, hired ‘Robocop,” and are all now driving cross-country with “Speed Racer”
Video.title: Aliens, Androids & Alternate Futures Vol. 2

Video.summary: No kids, we are not in Narnia. Let’s go to the “Little Shop of Horrors” and have a drink with “The Wild Angels.”
Video.title: The Chronicles of Corman

Video.summary: Take a closer look at the classic films of William Friedkin, Brian De Palma, and John Carpenter.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These are the early hits that made Steven Spielberg the biggest name in blockbuster movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Enter the minds of the twisted geniuses who gave birth to monstrous creations and big screen horrors.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 1: Monstrous Minds
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Explore the dark side of scientific ambition, where unhinged minds push the boundaries of big screen horror.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 2: The Perils of Playing God
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Reckless experiments lead to monstrous results in these horrific Hollywood cult hits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Mad, Mad, Mad Scientists Vol. 3: Experiments Gone Awry
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stung by the thought of losing her cosmetics empire, a woman goes to extreme and horrific lengths to find a cure for aging.
Video.title: The Wasp Woman

Video.summary: Humanity faces its greatest threat as the monstrous lizard Barugon is unleashed in Japan. It’s up to Gamera to find his way back to Earth and save the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A down-on-his-luck Humphrey Bogart teams with a group of crooks chasing their fortune in British East Africa.
Video.title: Beat the Devil

Video.summary: Science fiction dominated cinema screens in the 1980s, and these are the ones we'll always remember.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A doctor experimenting with transplant techniques keeps his girlfriend's head alive when she is decapitated in a car crash, then goes hunting for a new body.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a journey into the future with this collection of celebrated classic sci-fi action movies.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In space, only the people sitting next to you can hear you scream. So scream loud!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Step into the world of horror and sci-fi master John Carpenter with this spine-tingling look at some of his most celebrated films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Atomic scientists unknowingly awaken the colossal prehistoric turtle Gamera, whose titanic rampage threatens to destroy humanity.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In these sci-fi classics, no one is quite who they seem, and the threat of invasion is closer than you think.
Video.grandparentTitle: Impostor Syndrome: The Best of Big Screen Body Snatchers
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From "The Big Sleep" to "Casablanca" and beyond, this is the best of Humphrey Bogart.
Video.title: Episode 1
